title: SSRF defense: consistent DNS-rebind checks at all outbound request points
description: The codebase applies is_private_host_resolved() checks at every point where an outbound HTTP request is made from attacker-influenced input: follower inbox fetching (server.rs:741-745, 793-799), actor key fetching (actor_cache.rs:46-52), media URL fetching (media.rs:54-59), delivery inbox validation (delivery.rs:152-162), and shared inbox validation (server.rs:779-785). Redirect following is disabled on all HTTP clients. The check resolves DNS and blocks private IPs, and fails closed (returns blocked if DNS fails). This is thorough and consistent.
